name: Clever Cloud
description: European PaaS with git-push deployment, ISO 27001 and HDS certified, offering Heroku-like experience with data sovereignty.

seo.title: Clever Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Clever Cloud: European PaaS with git-push deployment, ISO 27001 and HDS certified, offering Heroku-like experience with data sovereignty.

when_to_use: Git-push deployment to a European PaaS with data sovereignty
GDPR-compliant app hosting with HDS certification for healthcare
Heroku-like developer experience with EU data residency
Deploying Node.js, Java, and PHP apps on French infrastructure
Managed databases with European data center guarantees

cons: Smaller catalog than AWS or GCP
Addons priced per-resource can add up
review.verdict: The solid, boring, EU-compliant PaaS many regulated European teams should be using.
review.best_for: EU startups and regulated teams needing HDS or GDPR-friendly PaaS
review.not_for: Teams needing deep managed-service breadth of AWS or GCP

developer_experience.reason: Git deploy, CLI, multi-lang, good docs
